title: Products
subtitle: Explore D'auchy.Studio's AI solutions that accompany people from daily life to business

lingalink.name: LingaLink
lingalink.description: A coaching service where AI provides automatic reviews in online lessons. Offers personalized learning experiences and supports effective skill development.

edumate.name: EduMate
edumate.description: A service where friends can collaborate on homework reviews and joint studying while creating reports for parents. Deepen understanding through collaborative learning.

officebrain.name: OfficeBrain
officebrain.description: A RAG system for sharing files and managing permissions within organizations. Enables secure information sharing and improves operational efficiency.

enterprise-llm.name: Enterprise LLM
enterprise-llm.description: An all-in-one enterprise platform integrating project management, knowledge sharing, and AI assistants. A comprehensive solution that maximizes team potential.

aigen-one.name: AiGen-One
aigen-one.description: An AI operations platform that turns frontline language into business systems and distributes managed AI features through an internal portal.

bayd-system.name: Bayd-System
bayd-system.description: Music rehearsal studio management system. AI-powered optimal studio search based on conditions, comprehensive support from booking to equipment management.
